## Working Title


## Format

Novel, novella, play, episode, chapter arc, anthology frame, RPG campaign frame, etc.


## Logline

One or two sentences.


## Beginning

Where do we enter the world, and what is already wrong?


## Middle

What complicates the situation? Who wants what? What gets funnier, hotter, stranger, or more dangerous?


## End

What choice, reversal, reveal, or office disaster resolves the piece?


## Liminal Officecore Set Pieces

List 3-5 scenes or locations.


## Character/Rig Hooks Needed

What kinds of rigs, departments, or characters would this outline need from other contributors?


## Provenance

- [ ] Human-written
- [ ] Agent-assisted
- [ ] Agent-generated and human-edited
- [ ] Other / explain:
